comment.text: This key represents the maximum allowed size for a folder upload. It's displayed in a SizeLimitSetter component within the UploadLimits section of Portal Settings, specifically when folder uploads are enabled. Translators should ensure this accurately reflects the size limit being enforced.

usage.context:
<CategorySubHeader>{t("UploadLimits")}</CategorySubHeader>
 <SizeLimitSetter
 labelText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizePerFolder")
 : t("MaximumFileSizePerFile")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSize")
 : t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
